LSE-MS8-L4-1400P-MSVPA-HJD-GBL-02 • MS Visual & Performing Arts — Music Grade 8 • Music & Cultural Connections

The Song They All Knew

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
Why did people sing the song at the gathering?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Construct a complete academic justification. State your claim about why people sang the song, support that claim with reasoning drawn directly from what the boy says, and articulate the conclusion that follows about what the song accomplished at the gathering.
CA ELD PI.B.5  |  CA Music Cn11.8  |  MS Music Grade 8: Music & Cultural Connections
